title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Himalaya Drug Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
